diagnoses.name: Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis
diagnoses.evidence_span: Patient is a gentleman with known amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS)

diagnoses.name: Chronic respiratory failure
diagnoses.evidence_span: He has dependence on a ventilator with underlying chronic respiratory failure

diagnoses.name: Ventilator-associated pneumonia
diagnoses.evidence_span: During this admission, he developed ventilator-associated pneumonia (VAP)

diagnoses.name: Non-ST elevation myocardial infarction
diagnoses.evidence_span: the patient suffered a non-ST elevation myocardial infarction (NSTEMI) during his hospital course

diagnoses.name: Acute kidney failure
diagnoses.evidence_span: He experienced acute kidney failure, attributed in part to nephropathy induced by medications

diagnoses.name: Acute pyelonephritis
diagnoses.evidence_span: with concurrent acute pyelonephritis and urinary tract infection secondary to E. coli

diagnoses.name: Urinary tract infection
diagnoses.evidence_span: with concurrent acute pyelonephritis and urinary tract infection secondary to E. coli

diagnoses.name: Encephalopathy
diagnoses.evidence_span: The patient also developed altered mental status consistent with encephalopathy of unclear etiology

diagnoses.name: Eosinophilia
diagnoses.evidence_span: Laboratory studies revealed metabolic alkalosis and eosinophilia

diagnoses.name: Type 2 diabetes mellitus
diagnoses.evidence_span: His underlying type 2 diabetes mellitus was managed throughout admission

diagnoses.name: Schizoaffective disorder
diagnoses.evidence_span: He has a long-standing history of schizoaffective disorder, unspecified

diagnoses.name: Adverse effect of penicillins
diagnoses.evidence_span: He developed a rash consistent with adverse effect from penicillins

procedures.name: Mechanical ventilation
procedures.evidence_span: Patient was intubated and placed on mechanical ventilation for greater than 96 consecutive hours

procedures.name: Intubation
procedures.evidence_span: Patient was intubated and placed on mechanical ventilation

procedures.name: Percutaneous central venous catheter insertion
procedures.evidence_span: A percutaneous central venous catheter was inserted into the superior vena cava

procedures.name: Tracheostomy care
procedures.evidence_span: Tracheostomy care was provided with attention to proper tube positioning and management

medications.name: Aspirin
medications.evidence_span: Chronic aspirin use documented; patient on long-term aspirin therapy
